name_full: Governmental Legal and Regulatory Framework for Safety
standard_id: IAEA Safety Standards Series No. GSR Part 1 (Rev. 1)
sector_applicability: Nuclear regulators governments operators radioactive waste authorities emergency planners and safeguards organizations
why_it_matters: Establishes requirements for the governmental legal and regulatory framework needed for nuclear and radiation safety
key_outputs: Governmental legal and regulatory safety requirements
notes: IAEA publication page identifies this as General Safety Requirements GSR Part 1 Rev. 1

standard_id: IAEA Safety Standards Series No. GSR Part 2
sector_applicability: Regulatory bodies operating organizations technical support organizations and facilities with radiation risks
why_it_matters: Establishes requirements for leadership management systems safety culture and systemic management of radiation and nuclear safety
notes: IAEA publication page identifies this as General Safety Requirements GSR Part 2

name_full: Radiation Protection and Safety of Radiation Sources International Basic Safety Standards
standard_id: IAEA Safety Standards Series No. GSR Part 3
sector_applicability: Radiation regulators medical and industrial radiation users environmental protection authorities emergency planners and employers
why_it_matters: Defines international basic safety standards for radiation protection and safety of radiation sources across planned existing and emergency exposure situations
notes: IAEA publication page identifies this as General Safety Requirements GSR Part 3

name_full: Preparedness and Response for a Nuclear or Radiological Emergency
standard_id: IAEA Safety Standards Series No. GSR Part 7
sector_applicability: Governments emergency response organizations nuclear operators regulators health authorities and international response partners
why_it_matters: Establishes requirements for preparedness and response for nuclear or radiological emergencies regardless of cause
key_outputs: Nuclear and radiological emergency preparedness requirements
notes: IAEA publication page identifies this as General Safety Requirements GSR Part 7

standard_id: IAEA Safety Standards Series No. SF-1
sector_applicability: Governments regulators nuclear operators radiation users waste managers emergency planners and international safety programs
why_it_matters: States the fundamental safety objective and ten principles that underpin IAEA nuclear and radiation safety standards
key_outputs: Fundamental nuclear and radiation safety principles
notes: IAEA publication page identifies this as Safety Fundamentals SF-1

standard_id: IAEA Safety Standards Series No. SSR-1
sector_applicability: Nuclear installation developers site evaluators regulators environmental assessors and emergency planning authorities
why_it_matters: Establishes requirements for evaluating nuclear installation sites to protect people and the environment from ionizing radiation risks
notes: IAEA publication page identifies this as Specific Safety Requirements SSR-1

name_full: Safety of Nuclear Power Plants Design
standard_id: IAEA Safety Standards Series No. SSR-2/1 (Rev. 1)
sector_applicability: Nuclear power plant designers manufacturers constructors operators regulators and technical support organizations
why_it_matters: Establishes design safety requirements for nuclear power plants using defence in depth and safety assessment principles
key_outputs: Nuclear power plant design safety requirements
notes: IAEA publication page identifies this as Specific Safety Requirements SSR-2/1 Rev. 1

name_full: Safety of Nuclear Power Plants Commissioning and Operation
standard_id: IAEA Safety Standards Series No. SSR-2/2 (Rev. 1)
sector_applicability: Nuclear power plant operators regulators commissioning teams maintenance organizations and emergency preparedness programs
why_it_matters: Establishes requirements for safe commissioning operation maintenance inspection and transition to decommissioning of nuclear power plants
key_outputs: Nuclear power plant commissioning and operation safety requirements
notes: IAEA publication page identifies this as Specific Safety Requirements SSR-2/2 Rev. 1
